business_problem: Wendy's—the second-largest US quick-service hamburger chain with thousands of restaurants worldwide—needed to retire aging on-premises ERP, planning, and HR systems and standardize on a single integrated platform that could keep pace with menu innovation, franchise operations, and finance and HR transformation.
solution_summary: Wendy's, the second-largest US fast-food burger chain with 7K+ franchisee restaurants, modernized from legacy Oracle E-Business Suite to a unified Oracle Fusion Cloud suite (ERP, EPM, HCM) to enable rapid, frictionless digital and data-driven customer and employee experiences. The transformation consolidated finance, planning, and HR for corporate employees and franchisees, built a custom billing-management extension for 7K+ franchisee payment processing, and migrated 21+ legacy databases to Exadata on OCI as a proof-of-concept that demonstrated 2x performance improvement.
products_used: Oracle Exadata Database Service on OCI
business_outcome: Wendy's standardized finance, planning, and HR on a single Oracle cloud platform, migrated 21+ databases to Exadata Database Service for higher performance and reliability, and unlocked continuous innovation from Oracle's quarterly cloud release cycle.
metrics: 21+ databases migrated to Exadata Database Service on OCI
Second-largest quick-service hamburger chain in the United States
architecture_clues: Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP, EPM, and HCM deployed as one integrated suite
21+ databases migrated to Oracle Exadata Database Service on OCI
evidence_quotes: Wendy's standardized its finance, planning, and HR operations on Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP, EPM, and HCM and moved more than 21 databases to Oracle Exadata Database Service on OCI.

solution_components.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP
solution_components.role: Unified finance and operations platform for Wendy's corporate entities and franchisee financial transactions; custom billing extension manages payment processing for 7K+ restaurants.

solution_components.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud EPM
solution_components.role: Enterprise planning, budgeting, and financial close automation; simplified chart of accounts structure and provided cross-unit visibility.

solution_components.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM
solution_components.role: Global workforce management for corporate employees and franchisee staff; goal setting, performance feedback, and development planning; improved franchisee experience.

solution_components.name: Oracle Exadata Database Service on OCI
solution_components.role: High-performance database hosting for legacy Oracle E-Business Suite workloads during transition phase; demonstrated 2x performance improvement justifying broader cloud migration.

data_flow: Corporate finance data (cash flow, income, balance sheet) and franchisee billing data → Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP; global HR and payroll data → Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM; planning data → Oracle Fusion Cloud EPM; legacy E-Business Suite databases migrated to Exadata on OCI during transition.
integration_points: global workforce across corporate and franchisees
